title: Adult skills fund: funding rules
body: "These documents set out the adult skills fund (ASF) for the relevant funding year. The rules apply to all providers of education and training that receive ASF from the Secretary of State for Education acting through the Department for Education (DfE).    If you have any feedback or questions after reading our funding rules, or if there’s anything else you need help with, you can find more support on our customer help centre.  "
